themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: The shepherd theme emphasizes the Lord’s active leading, direction, and care along the path. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want. This beloved opening of Scripture's most famous ps...". Cross references echo "Righteousness".

themes.label: Trust
themes.summary: Confidence in God’s presence steadies the believer through danger and into lasting security. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil: for thou a...".
